theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 66점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 48 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 8.9% → 2-ATR 손절폭 17.8%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +65.2% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $401.4 아래 손절가 $247.5 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Shutterstock Shares Fall After Getty Says It Will End Merger
top_news.summary: Shares of Shutterstock Inc. plunged about 30% in after-hours trading after Getty Images Holdings Inc. said it would cancel a planned merger due to a ruling from UK regulators.

top_news.title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
top_news.summary: Alcoa Corp. agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in Australia, Brazil and South Africa in a deal valued at as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position among the world’s largest aluminum producers as long-term demand strengthens.

top_news.title: Oil Steadies as Peace Talks, Flows Through Hormuz in Focus
top_news.summary: Oil steadied after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Nike Appoints Pfizer CFO as New Finance Chief Amid Industry Experience Questions
top_news.summary: Nina Trentmann, Senior Editor at Bloomberg News, discussed the recent appointment of Dave Denton, formerly Pfizer's CFO, as Nike's new Finance Chief. While some analysts have expressed concerns about Denton's lack of direct retail and apparel industry experience, Trentmann noted that for large companies like Nike and Pfizer, deep industry knowledge may be less critical than experience managing a complex, global business with a significant market capitalization and extensive supply chains. She sp

top_news.title: Progress Software Earnings Beat Estimates, Boosts Forecast
top_news.summary: Yogesh Gupta, CEO of Progress Software, said that AI is a big driver for his company as it beat earnings estimates and boosts forecasts for the next quarter. Gupta said that his company can aggregate data for AI in a way that reduces the number of tokens necessary to run AI agents and saves customers money.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Assessing Nike vs. Adidas as World Cup Heats Up
top_news.summary: Drake MacFarlane, M Science Research Analyst, expressed cautious optimism about Nike's recent apparel sales boost, particularly from soccer jerseys, noting it as a positive short-term factor. However, he emphasized that Nike's need to strengthen its sports credentials and improve its footwear segment represents a longer-term challenge. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: China’s Factory Activity Returns to Growth | The China Show 6/30/2026
top_news.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Brazil Real Becomes ‘Collateral Damage’ as Dollar Roars Back
top_news.summary: The Brazilian real recorded its worst month this year as a rebound in the dollar and shifting interest-rate expectations push investors to unwind one of their most favored carry trades.

top_news.title: Citigroup CEO Brings Long-Troubled Bank Into Trump’s Graces
top_news.summary: Citigroup's CEO Jane Fraser has brought the third-largest bank back from the brink and is quickly building a rapport with President Trump and his administration, a feat that has eluded many peers. Todd Gillespie explains how she managed it  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Kura Sushi to Accelerate US Growth to Fend Off Rivals’ Expansion
top_news.summary: Conveyor-belt sushi operator Kura Sushi Inc. has an ambitious target to grow its store count by 20% a year in the US, betting that it can build market share before a wave of competitors rolls in.
